title: Flaky Buttery Polish Chicken Puff
description: A tender and floral Polish dish featuring ancho chillies and lamination-puff, perfect for a low-carb meal prep option.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the garlic powder, dried thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Season the chicken breast with the garlic powder mixture.
Roll out the puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a large rectangle.
Place the chicken breast in the center of the pastry rectangle.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the beaten egg.
Fold the pastry over the chicken, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the puff pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the top of the puff pastry with the unsalted butter.
Bake the puff pastry for 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
